# MLStyleTransfer.ModelParameters.ValidationData

**Enumeration**

The source of a validation dataset for a style transfer model.

## Declaration

```swift
enum ValidationData
```

## Designating validation data

- **MLStyleTransfer.ModelParameters.ValidationData.content(_:)**: The location of a validation image you use to validate the model.
- **MLStyleTransfer.ModelParameters.ValidationData.none**: An empty validation dataset you use to skip model validation.

## Describing parameters

- **MLStyleTransfer.ModelParameters.ModelAlgorithmType**: The style transfer training algorithm options.

## Conforms To

- Copyable
- Equatable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
